title: Tile Tactics
description: An expanded turn-based strategy game with 7 levels and 5 enemy types. Control a single unit on progressively larger grids (8x8→16x16) to defeat varied enemies: Scouts (fast), Tanks (slow+tanky), Berserkers (aggressive), Healers (supportive), and Standard enemies. Master the combo multiplier by dodging damage, beat levels quickly for speed bonuses, and adjust difficulty for score multipliers (1.5x normal, 2x hard). Features three difficulty levels with balanced enemy compositions and progressive difficulty scaling.
